DESCRIPTION: Verify that retrieving a booking with a non-existent ID returns 404
NAME: shouldNotBeAbleToGetBookingWithNonExistentId

DESCRIPTION: Verify that all existing booking IDs can be retrieved successfully
NAME: shouldBeAbleToGetAllBookings

DESCRIPTION: Verify that a user can successfully create an authentication token with valid credentials
NAME: shouldBeAbleToCreateTokenWithValidCredentials

DESCRIPTION: Verify that a specific booking can be retrieved successfully using a valid booking ID
NAME: shouldBeAbleToGetBookingById

DESCRIPTION: Verify that retrieving a booking with invalid non-numeric ID returns 404
NAME: shouldNotBeAbleToGetBookingWithInvalidId

DESCRIPTION: Verify that authentication fails when username field is missing from the payload
NAME: shouldNotBeAbleToCreateTokenWithMissingUsername

DESCRIPTION: Verify that creating a booking fails when mandatory field firstname is missing
NAME: shouldNotBeAbleToCreateBookingWithMissingFirstname

DESCRIPTION: Verify that a new booking can be created successfully with valid and complete data
NAME: shouldBeAbleToCreateBookingWithValidData

DESCRIPTION: Verify that authentication fails with invalid password and returns Bad credentials
NAME: shouldNotBeAbleToCreateTokenWithInvalidPassword

DESCRIPTION: Verify that booking IDs can be filtered by firstname and lastname query parameters
NAME: shouldBeAbleToFilterBookingsByName
